description: A public works manager is scheduling annual preventive maintenance for a city-owned HVAC unit.

nodes.task_description: Identify the HVAC unit in the asset management system.

expected_outcome.value: The manager locates the correct asset record.

nodes.task_description: Review the manufacturer's recommended maintenance schedule.

expected_outcome.value: The manager confirms the required annual maintenance tasks.

nodes.task_description: Create a work order for the internal maintenance crew to perform the service.

expected_outcome.value: The manager successfully creates and assigns the preventive maintenance work order.
